examples: Make sure your workstation is correct.
Above each machinist's workstation, there was a wooden cube with a different colour painted on each face.
Each employee was given a biscuit and a cup of tea, guided to a workstation and within half an hour started a 12-hour shift fitting glass screens into beveled frames.
Get to the office and I plug in the peripherals and voila, my workstation.
The Sony PlayStation contains a chip more powerful than one in a Sun workstation.
